positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest landscape at dusk. The scene features exaggerated, curved silhouettes of stylized trees and exotic flora, creating a sense of enchanted mystery. The color palette should use deep indigos, forest greens, and pops of electric cyan and glowing gold for contrast. Emphasize clean lines, bold negative space, and symmetry for a centered composition, suitable for a repeating pattern or single chest print. Use a graphic novel art style mixed with Art Deco poster elements. The lighting is dramatic backlighting, giving everything a crisp, flat, poster-like quality. Vector art quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, artifacts, watermarks, text, logos, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, clutter, low contrast
